stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
With regard to the given OFP, which statement is correct concerning the ground speed experienced between WPT1 and WPT2 when the accumulated flight time after this segment was equal to 27 minutes?

options.a: The GS is approximately 100 kt lower than expected.
options.b: The GS is approximately 40 kt lower than expected.
options.c: The GS is equal to approximately 67 kt.
options.d: The GS is equal to approximately 100 kt.
